tree.label: Deliver a minimum tree-organized desktop web browser

children.label: Define the uv-managed Python application package
Configure the package metadata, Qt dependency, console launcher, and test settings
Create the browser package marker
Lock resolved Python dependencies for reproducible uv installs
Exclude virtual environments and Python caches from project files
Implement hierarchical tab browsing and navigation
Create the Qt window, tab tree, stacked browser views, navigation controls, and URL handling
Cover empty addresses, domain normalization, and search-query conversion
Document local deployment and daily browser use
Provide quick-start, tab-tree usage, deployment, and test instructions
Record the implementation evidence map
Create the ATML project trace
Inspect the completed project files and line counts

wc -l .gitignore README.md pyproject.toml src/tree_browser/__init__.py src/tree_browser/app.py tests/test_address.py uv.lock && rg --files -g '!*.pyc' -g '!*.lock' -g '!.venv/**' && sed -n '1,220p' README.md && sed -n '1,120p' pyproject.toml

evidence.value: wc -l .gitignore README.md pyproject.toml src/tree_browser/__init__.py src/tree_browser/app.py tests/test_address.py uv.lock && rg --files -g '!*.pyc' -g '!*.lock' -g '!.venv/**' && sed -n '1,220p' README.md && sed -n '1,120p' pyproject.toml
evidence.result: Observed 509 lines across the seven project artifacts and reviewed the README and package manifest.

children.label: Validate the trace document and final artifact inventory
perl -MJSON::PP -0777 -e 'decode_json(<>)' traces.json && wc -l traces.json && rg --files -g '!*.pyc' -g '!*.lock' -g '!.venv/**' | sort

evidence.value: perl -MJSON::PP -0777 -e 'decode_json(<>)' traces.json && wc -l traces.json && rg --files -g '!*.pyc' -g '!*.lock' -g '!.venv/**' | sort
evidence.result: JSON parsed successfully; the trace was 122 lines before recording this validation and the final source inventory was listed.

children.label: sed -n '1,260p' traces.json && perl -MJSON::PP -0777 -e 'decode_json(<>)' traces.json && wc -l .gitignore README.md pyproject.toml src/tree_browser/__init__.py src/tree_browser/app.py tests/test_address.py traces.json uv.lock

evidence.value: sed -n '1,260p' traces.json && perl -MJSON::PP -0777 -e 'decode_json(<>)' traces.json && wc -l .gitignore README.md pyproject.toml src/tree_browser/__init__.py src/tree_browser/app.py tests/test_address.py traces.json uv.lock
evidence.result: Reviewed the ATML tree, confirmed valid JSON, and observed final line counts for all created project artifacts.

children.label: Inspect workspace-owned agent configuration directories
find .agents .codex -maxdepth 3 -mindepth 1 -printf '%y %p\n' | sort; ls -ld .agents .codex

evidence.result: Both directories existed, were read-only, and contained no files or subdirectories.

children.label: Publish the completed browser project to GitHub

git init -b main && git add .gitignore README.md pyproject.toml src tests traces.json uv.lock && git commit -m "Build tree-organized Python browser" && git remote add origin git@github.com:balalida22/tree-browser.git && git push -u origin main

evidence.value: git init -b main && git add .gitignore README.md pyproject.toml src tests traces.json uv.lock && git commit -m "Build tree-organized Python browser" && git remote add origin git@github.com:balalida22/tree-browser.git && git push -u origin main
evidence.result: Initialized main, created root commit e79258f with eight project files, and pushed main to github.com:balalida22/tree-browser.git.

children.label: Record the GitHub publication in the ATML evidence map
Validate the trace and amend the published commit with its delivery evidence
perl -MJSON::PP -0777 -e 'decode_json(<>)' traces.json && git add traces.json && git commit --amend --no-edit && git push --force-with-lease && git status --short --branch

evidence.value: perl -MJSON::PP -0777 -e 'decode_json(<>)' traces.json && git add traces.json && git commit --amend --no-edit && git push --force-with-lease && git status --short --branch
evidence.result: Validated the trace, amended the root commit as e98aaf0, force-with-lease pushed main, and observed a clean branch tracking origin/main.
